option.name: command
option.long: The absolute command execution line, including arguments, passed to systemd-run.

option.name: enabled
option.long: Toggles whether this desktop process should actively be managed and started during initialization.

option.name: restart_on_crash
option.long: Maps to systemd Restart=on-failure. Re-spawns the application automatically if it terminates abnormally.

option.name: restart_on_graceful
option.long: Maps to systemd Restart=always. Re-spawns the application even if it exited cleanly with return code 0.

option.name: fork_on_start
option.long: Maps to systemd Type=forking. Required for older daemons that detach from the primary process group initialization loop.
